query_strategy_description: 25 web-search queries grouped into 6 buckets that map to the report's 19 sections. Use WebSearch (native Claude tool). Avoid named-firm aggregator results; prefer government bodies, listed-company filings, trade associations, and primary research firms with cited methodology.

localized_search.source_tagging: English alias only (e.g. [GSO 2024]) per L.3. Page-bottom SOURCE KEY may include original local-language source name for traceability.
localized_search.currency_hint: Fire a parallel local-currency query for sizing buckets (e.g. VND/IDR/THB/JPY/KRW) since local stats rarely report in USD.
localized_search.note: Phase M.1: dual-language search. EN baseline still runs (existing query_buckets above); this block governs the additional local-language pass.

query_buckets.purpose: Macro context, GDP, policy, urbanization → drives 06_macro_pages
Industry total size, CAGR, segment splits → drives 08_sector_sizing + 09_segments
expected_sources: named research firms with methodology disclosed
query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 60% / estimate 40% (segment breakdowns often need KIRA triangulation)

query_buckets.purpose: Distribution mix, demand drivers, regulatory landscape → drives 14_demand_channels + 15_regulatory
AI market sizing in industry, named use cases → drives 17_ai_overview_and_use_cases
queries: generative AI {{industry}} Southeast Asia adoption survey
AI productivity gains {{industry}} efficiency cost reduction
expected_sources: McKinsey Global Institute style horizons reports
BCG / Accenture industry AI surveys (read but never cite by name)
company press releases on AI deployments
academic papers on AI in industry
query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 55% / estimate 35% / primary 10% (KIRA synthesizes from multi-source)
query_buckets.note: Voice rule: AI section can describe AI prominently. Brand rule still applies elsewhere — never lead with AI in headlines outside this section.

query_buckets.expected_tag_mix: secondary 50% / estimate 50% (KIRA synthesizes scenarios from base-case external data)

query_execution_rules.parallelism: Run queries in parallel within a bucket (up to 5 concurrent). Sequential across buckets so later buckets can reference earlier findings.
result_filtering: Discard results from named-firm aggregators (Mordor, Frost, Euromonitor, IMARC, etc.) — anti-positioning rule
Prefer results with citeable methodology disclosure
If a number appears in 3+ independent sources within ±10%, treat as well-anchored secondary
If a number appears in only 1 source, either find corroboration or downgrade to KIRA estimate with anchor commentary
query_execution_rules.estimate_methodology_template: Anchored estimate: {{anchor_metric}} × {{ratio}} = {{output}}. E.g. 'APAC USD {{X}}bn × {{country}}'s construction GDP share ~6-7% → {{country}} estimate USD {{Y}}bn'.
query_execution_rules.research_data_output_format: Aggregate findings into a single JSON file matching the shape of references/research_data_R0152.json — top-level keys for each major data bucket, each value tagged with source URL + access date + extraction method.

template_variable_resolution.{{country_stats_bureau}}: Mapped via lookup: ID→BPS, VN→GSO, TH→NSO, PH→PSA, MY→DOSM, SG→SingStat, etc.
template_variable_resolution.{{sub_industry_1}}: First sub_industry from parser (if multi-segment topic)
template_variable_resolution.{{year}}: Topic year (parser output, default current year)
template_variable_resolution.{{leading_player_candidate}}: Filled iteratively as competitive bucket runs — pre-known players or top-result company names
